data.title: What's Going On With Tilray Stock Today?
data.description:
Tilray Brands, Inc. (NASDAQ:TLRY) shares rose modestly in premarket trading Thursday after the company announced a major move in Italy's medical cannabis sector.

Tilray Medical Italia now replaces the unit formerly known as FL Group as part of the company's effort to broaden its regulated medical cannabis footprint in Europe, reflecting a strategic commitment to a unified platform across key markets.

Italy remains one of Europe's most regulated medical cannabis markets. Tilray said the newly named entity will offer a wider range of medicines approved by that country's health authorities.

The company also cited collaboration with Molteni Farmaceutici, an Italian pharma partner that supports distribution through hospitals, doctors and pharmacies.

"Italy remains a strategically important market for Tilray Medical as we continue to build a leading, regulated medical cannabis platform across Europe," said Rajnish Ohri, president of international at Tilray Brands.

He said the new branding strengthens local operations and reiterates the company's long-term focus on patient care and physician support.

Medical Cannabis Offerings

Tilray Medical Italia distributes pharmaceutical-grade cannabis products by prescription under Italian Ministry of Health rules.

Its product list includes high-THC flowers plus balanced and THC-CBD oil treatments designed for diverse medical needs.

All therapies are EU-GMP certified and conform to strict quality, safety and regulatory standards.

Through its European medical infrastructure, Tilray supports cultivation, manufacturing and quality oversight across multiple regulated markets.

Partnership With Molteni

Molteni Farmaceutici brings pharmaceutical experience and a broad professional network to Tilray's Italy operation.

The collaboration aims to increase physician engagement and ensure responsible prescribing and patient access.

The move in Italy aligns with Tilray Medical's strategy to unify its global medical cannabis business. The company has active programs in more than 20 countries and emphasizes evidence-based therapies and regulatory compliance.

TLRY Price Action: Tilray Brands shares were up 1.85% at $8.83 during premarket trading on Thursday, according to Benzinga Pro data.

Photo via Shutterstock

data.title: Axcelis Enters A Low-Momentum Phase As Upside Follow-Through Fades
data.description:
Axcelis Technologies (NASDAQ:ACLS) is currently in Phase 18, the final stage of its 18-phase Adhishthana cycle on the weekly charts. Based on the stock's internal structure, this phase is likely to be characterised by consolidation and sluggish price action rather than a trending move. Here's why.

Analysing Axcelis' Triad Structure

To assess how Phase 18 may unfold, it is critical to revisit the stock's Guna Triads.

Under the Adhishthana framework, Phases 14, 15, and 16 together form the Guna Triads. These phases determine whether a stock is capable of achieving a Nirvana move in Phase 18, which represents the peak of the cycle.

For a Nirvana move to materialise, the triads must exhibit Satoguna, a clean, sustainable bullish structure. Without this quality, a Nirvana rally cannot emerge.

As outlined in Adhishthana: The Principles That Govern Wealth, Time & Tragedy:

"Without noticeable Satoguna in any of the triads, no Nirvana can emerge in Phase 18."

In Axcelis' case, the triads failed to display any bullish characteristics. Throughout Phases 14 to 16, the stock remained under heavy pressure, losing more than 74% of its value as it declined from the 160 region into the 40s. This behaviour clearly rules out the possibility of a Nirvana move in the current Phase 18.

Investor Outlook

With a weak triad structure on the weekly charts, Axcelis' near-term outlook appears muted. Phase 18 is likely to be dominated by consolidation and sluggish movement rather than a sustained trend.

This may not be an ideal environment for aggressive directional positioning. More experienced options traders could consider range-bound strategies to take advantage of time decay, especially as open interest continues to build in out-of-the-money calls, suggesting expectations of limited upside momentum. A clearer directional bias is more likely to emerge only after the current phase concludes and the cycle resets.

Benzinga Disclaimer: This article is from an unpaid external contributor. It does not represent Benzinga’s reporting and has not been edited for content or accuracy.

data.title: Nvidia Dethrones Apple As Taiwan Semiconductor's Largest Customer
data.description:
Nvidia Corp's (NASDAQ:NVDA) surge in artificial intelligence demand is reshaping the global semiconductor supply chain.

Nvidia has overtaken Apple Inc. (NASDAQ:AAPL) as Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co. Ltd's (NYSE:TSM) largest customer.

Nvidia chief Jensen Huang confirmed the change publicly for the first time during a recent podcast.

Nvidia now ranks as Taiwan Semiconductor's biggest client—an outcome he suggested would please Taiwan Semiconductor founder Morris Chang.

Podcast host Jodi Shelton recalled that Chang once shared a story from their first meeting, when Huang boldly told him Nvidia would one day become his largest customer or one of his biggest, Futunn News reported on Thursday.

The rapid rise of artificial intelligence has since shifted industry priorities. According to the report, Nvidia now contributes about 13% of Taiwan Semiconductor's total revenue.

Nvidia previously held that position in the early 2000s. However, Apple took the lead in the 2010s after outsourcing production of iPhone and iPad processors to Taiwan Semiconductor.

The report also mentions that Apple has reportedly secured about half of Taiwan Semiconductor's 2-nanometer capacity for its upcoming A20 and A20 Pro smartphone chips.

Analysts See Nvidia's AI Leadership Extending Into 2026

The chip designer became the first company to hit the $4.5 trillion market cap in October as the AI ambitions of companies like Microsoft Corp (NASDAQ:MSFT), Google parent Alphabet Inc (NASDAQ:GOOGL), and Amazon.com Inc (NASDAQ:AMZN) continue to fuel demand for Nvidia's graphics processing units.

JPMorgan analyst Harlan Sur said AI-driven demand continues to strongly favor Nvidia as the semiconductor sector heads into the fourth quarter of 2025 earnings season with momentum that should extend into 2026.

Sur tied Nvidia's strength to sustained AI infrastructure spending. The analyst sees meaningful upside in the AI accelerator market, which he estimates at roughly $200 billion in 2025.

Within that landscape, Sur keeps Nvidia as a top pick, citing its central role in accelerated compute.

Price Actions: Nvidia shares were up 0.82% at $184.83 during premarket trading on Thursday, according to Benzinga Pro data. Taiwan Semiconductor stock is up 1.63%.

Photo via Shutterstock

data.title: What's Going On With ACM Research Stock Thursday?
data.description:
ACM Research, Inc. (NASDAQ:ACMR) stock rose Thursday after the company revised its 2025 outlook and provided above-consensus 2026 guidance.

Details

ACM Research revised its 2025 revenue outlook to $885–$900 million, from $875–$925 million (versus consensus of $904.47 million).

For 2026, the company projects revenue of $1.080 billion to $1.175 billion (versus the street view of $1.05 billion).

Management Commentary

Dr. David Wang, ACM’s President and Chief Executive Officer, states that he expects stronger revenue growth in 2026, driven by continued investments in production capacity and market share gains from the newer products.

He adds that customer WFE spending is anticipated to remain relatively stable, with additional contributions from our single-wafer SPM cleaners, Tahoe cleaning tools, and Furnace series.

Also, management projects acceleration in their Oregon investments to aid the industry’s move toward domestic semiconductor manufacturing.

ACM plans to release its fourth quarter and full year 2025 results in late February 2026.

ACMR Price Action: ACM Research shares were up 2.39% at $54.73 during premarket trading on Thursday. The stock is trading near its 52-week high of $54.82, according to Benzinga Pro data.

Photo by Pavel Kapyshy via Shutterstock

data.title: How To Trade SPY, QQQ, AAPL, MSFT, NVDA, GOOGL, META, TSLA Using Technical Analysis
data.description:
Good Morning Traders!

Today's session brings a heavy concentration of high impact economic data, which increases the likelihood of sharp and fast market reactions. At 8:30AM ET, traders will receive Initial and Continuing Jobless Claims, Core PCE Prices, US GDP, and PCE. This cluster of releases will be critical in shaping expectations around inflation trends, economic growth, and the future path of monetary policy. 

Later in the session at 1:00PM ET, the Treasury will hold the 10 Year TIPS auction, which can influence rate expectations and broader market positioning. With so many key data points hitting in a short window, volatility may be elevated throughout the day as markets digest the information and reposition.

Now, we will discuss SPY, QQQ, AAPL, MSFT, NVDA, GOOGL, META, and TSLA.

SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust (SPY)

SPY is currently trading around 689.00 as the market heads into a data heavy session. Buyers will want to see this area hold as near term balance, as stability here opens the door for a push toward 691.00. If momentum builds on positive data reactions, price could extend into 693.25 where sellers are likely to test strength. A sustained bid above that zone would signal growing confidence and could allow for a broader upside continuation. 

If SPY fails to hold 689.00, downside pressure may develop quickly into 686.75. A break below that level would likely invite a deeper rotation toward 684.50 as traders reassess risk. Continued weakness through that area would suggest sellers gaining control, increasing the odds of a larger downside move during the session.

Invesco QQQ Trust Series 1 (QQQ)

QQQ is currently trading near 621.25, sitting in the middle of an important range. Buyers will look for support to firm up here, which could allow price to rotate higher into 623.75. If tech responds well to the economic data, momentum could carry into 626.00 where prior supply may reappear. Holding above that area would suggest a constructive shift in sentiment. 

If QQQ loses 621.25, sellers may pressure price into 618.75 fairly quickly. Failure to stabilize there opens the door toward 616.25, a level that has acted as a pivot recently. A sustained move below that zone would indicate increasing risk aversion across growth names.

Apple Inc. (AAPL)

Apple is currently trading around 249.00 and attempting to stabilize after recent volatility. If buyers can defend this level, a grind higher into 251.25 becomes possible. Continued strength may allow price to reach 253.00, where sellers are likely to be more active. Holding above that would suggest improving short term structure. 

If AAPL slips below 249.00, downside pressure could push price into 246.75. A break there increases the likelihood of a move toward 244.50. Continued selling through that area would signal fading buyer interest and a more defensive posture.

Microsoft Corp. (MSFT)
Microsoft is currently trading near 448.00, a level where buyers are attempting to slow recent downside momentum. If support holds, price could rotate higher into 450.50. Strength through that area may allow a push toward 453.25 as traders reassess risk following the data. 

If MSFT fails to hold 448.00, sellers may press price into 445.75. Losing that level opens the door toward 443.25. Sustained weakness would reflect continued caution toward large cap tech exposure.

NVIDIA Corporation (NVDA)

NVIDIA is currently trading around 185.00 as it remains sensitive to broader market direction. A hold above this level could lead to a move into 187.75. If buyers step in aggressively, price may extend toward 190.00 where profit taking is likely to emerge. 

If NVDA loses 185.00, sellers may push price into 182.75. A break below that level could accelerate downside toward 180.25. Continued weakness would suggest semiconductors remain under pressure during volatile conditions.

Alphabet Inc Class A (GOOGL)

Alphabet is currently trading near 334.50 and attempting to maintain upward structure. If buyers hold this area, price could rotate higher into 337.50. Strength beyond that may allow an extension toward 340.25, signaling continued accumulation. 

If GOOGL slips below 334.50, sellers may drive price into 331.75. A breakdown there could lead to a deeper pullback toward 328.75 as buyers step aside.

Meta Platforms Inc (META)

Meta is currently trading around 625.25 as it consolidates after recent moves. Holding this level could allow price to climb into 628.75. If momentum builds, an extension toward 632.00 becomes possible with improving sentiment. 

If META fails to hold 625.25, downside pressure may push price into 621.75. Continued weakness could lead to a move toward 618.50, signaling reduced risk appetite.

Tesla Inc. (TSLA)

Tesla is currently trading near 435.75 and attempting to regain balance. A firm hold here could lead to a push toward 439.25. Continued buying may allow price to reach 443.00 where sellers are likely to respond. 

If TSLA breaks below 435.75, sellers may pressure price into 432.25. Failure to hold that level opens the door toward 428.75 as volatility expands.

Final Word: Patience, discipline, and risk management will be essential. Good luck and trade safely.

Benzinga Disclaimer: This article is from an unpaid external contributor. It does not represent Benzinga’s reporting and has not been edited for content or accuracy.
